name: Maharajah and the Sepoys
author: AGP
description: A classic asymmetric chess variant. Seat 0 (the Maharajah, White) has a SINGLE super-piece on e1 that moves as a queen OR a knight (an Amazon) and is royal. Seat 1 (the Sepoys, Black) has a full standard chess army but its pawns cannot promote. The Sepoys move first. White wins by checkmating the Sepoy king; Black wins by checkmating/capturing the lone Maharajah.
